data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. The Chairman of the US SEC stated: The US has lagged behind in the crypto space for a decade, and establishing a regulatory framework is a top priority. 2. Aster updated its Stage 3 trading points rules: both spot and perpetual contract trading volume are included, and fraudulent practices such as wash trading are strictly prohibited. 3. Trump's second son stated: He has never discussed cryptocurrency with his father, but he firmly believes that blockchain is the future of finance. 4. He Yi again addressed the issue of Binance Alpha's airdrop being "difficult to grab," stating that the issue will be resolved. 5. Large-scale profitable addresses on COAI are suspected to be operated by quantitative groups, not the project itself. 6. imToken issued a security statement: Wallet private key randomness is secure, and no users are affected. 7. Binance Alpha: Merlin Chain (MERL) second airdrop launched, with a minimum claim of 240 points. 8. The SLERF contract price is now four times higher than the on-chain price, possibly due to arbitrage fluctuations caused by the suspension of deposits on CEXs. 9. A new wallet withdrew 744,000 LINK worth $12.44 million from Binance two hours ago. 10. Vitalik A statement was issued calling on ZK and FHE developers to measure efficiency loss with "performance ratio"; 11. Binance: Users who meet the points requirements can claim the Alpha airdrop at 4:00 PM today.

data.title: JPMorgan: crypto-native leverage drove sell-off; ETFs barely flinched
data.description:
JPMorgan attributes the recent Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) sell-off to crypto-native leverage rather than institutional exits, noting that spot ETFs and CME futures absorbed minimal forced selling while perpetual futures markets faced sharp deleveraging across both assets. Bitcoin fell 13. 1% from $122,316 on Oct. 3 to $106,329 by Oct
source: https://cryptoslate.com/jpmorgan-crypto-native-leverage-drove-sell-off-etfs-barely-flinched/

data.title: Four.Meme will launch a token name protection function to prevent duplicate creation and confusion
data.description: Meme platform Four.Meme has announced the launch of a "Token Name Protection" feature to improve fairness and prevent confusion in project names. This mechanism automatically triggers when a token is in the Fair Mode bonding curve phase and the number of holders exceeds 100. Once triggered, the token's name and ticker will be locked for 72 hours, during which time no new Fair Mode tokens with the same or similar names can be created. The system also cross-checks Free Mode and Fair Mode to ensure that duplicate names are not possible between the two modes. Officials stated that this move aims to maintain a cleaner and more transparent meme creation environment and ensure that each project has a unique identity. This feature is currently in the testing and optimization phase.

data.title: Altcoins Selling Pressure Persists As Exchange Inflow Hits 2025 High — Details
data.description:
Altcoins have not quite recovered from the significant downturn that hit the financial markets a week ago. Most large-cap cryptocurrency assets, including Bitcoin, are either revisiting their low from the previous week or struggling to mount any real pressure from their current position. For instance, the largest altcoin by market cap, Ethereum, after briefly returning to above $4,200 earlier this week, is back to its level in the aftermath of the October 10th bloodbath. According to the latest on-chain data, it appears that investors are increasingly losing confidence in the long-term promise of the altcoins
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/altcoins-selling-pressure-exchange-inflow-2025/

data.title: OKX opened SLERF deposits, and the spot price plummeted by nearly 70%, approaching the same level as the on-chain price.
data.description: According to crypto analyst Ai Yi @ai_9684xtpa, OKX has opened SLERF deposits, and the spot price has instantly dropped from $0.23 to $0.07982, almost matching the on-chain price. Meanwhile, the Binance Futures price has also fallen back to $0.07856.

data.title: Momentum's cumulative transaction volume exceeds US$23 billion
data.description: According to the latest data, Momentum, the leading decentralized exchange (DEX) and liquidity hub within the Sui ecosystem, has surpassed $23 billion in cumulative trading volume. Since surpassing $20 billion on October 12th, trading volume has increased by over $3 billion in just six days, representing a 15% increase from the previous week, continuing its strong growth momentum.

data.title: Charles Hoskinson Calls Midnight Cardano’s Most Transformational Project Yet
data.description:
Charles Hoskinson, the co-founder of Cardano, has recently expressed his belief that Midnight represents the most transformative project the Cardano ecosystem has seen to date. He emphasizes the potential of this initiative to revolutionize the way we think about blockchain technology and its applications, highlighting its unique features and capabilities that could significantly impact various industries and enhance user experiences within the Cardano network.
source: https://blocknews.com/charles-hoskinson-calls-midnight-cardanos-most-transformational-project-yet/

data.title: Dogecoin Tanks 21% as Whales Dump $74 Million — Despite Nasdaq Merger Buzz
data.description:
Dogecoin, the popular cryptocurrency that started as a meme, experienced a significant decline of 21% in its value after major investors, often referred to as "whales," sold off a staggering $74 million worth of the digital currency. This drop occurred even in the midst of excitement and speculation surrounding a potential merger with the Nasdaq, highlighting the volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market and the impact that large-scale sell-offs can have on asset prices.
source: https://blocknews.com/dogecoin-tanks-21-as-whales-dump-74-million-despite-nasdaq-merger-buzz/
